userOutcome: prime() produces rich, feature-aware context summaries that include active observations, resolved contradictions, lane status, and work order automation state.
scopeSummary: Add --feature flag to prime CLI. Enhance prime() to render work order status, lane health, and grouped observations. Improve observation sourcing with artifact path links.
risks: Richer context increases token consumption in prime() output
readinessReason: No blocking decisions. All data already in DB.
handoffSummary: Add feature parameter to prime(). Render work order status + lane health + grouped observations + artifact source paths in markdown sections.
